name: Gabrielle Giffords
subject: [Rising Star Award] Only 1 day left to vote!
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5082/24c69fd9/105200cb0/18967a66/789823366/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENEO15N_digital_email_20180306_RisingStarVoteClose_inact&source=WQENEO15N_digital_email_20180306_RisingStarVoteClose_inact")
---

Peter,

Having any award named after you is an honor.

But to be the namesake of the EMILY's List Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award -- an organization that has supported me through multiple campaigns -- has been one of my biggest honors.

Every year, this award is given to a pro-choice Democratic woman doing incredible work in elected office at the state and local level who has a bright career in public service ahead of her.

And this year's nominees are an impressive bunch -- you'll want be able to say you knew them at the start of their careers.

**[Learn more about each of the six finalists, and then cast your vote for who you think should be the 2018 Rising Star Award recipient-- voting closes at 5:00 p.m. ET tomorrow, so don't wait!](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5082/24c69fd9/105200cb0/18967a67/789823366/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20180228_website_RisingStarVoting?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Learn+more+about+each+of+the+six+finalis&utm_campaign=WQENEO15N_digital_email_20180306_RisingStarVoteClose_inact&source=WQENEO15N_digital_email_20180306_RisingStarVoteClose_inact")**
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5082/24c69fd9/105200cb0/18967a60/789823366/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20180228_website_RisingStarVoting?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQENEO15N_digital_email_20180306_RisingStarVoteClose_inact&source=WQENEO15N_digital_email_20180306_RisingStarVoteClose_inact")
These six finalists are nothing short of extraordinary, and if you don't know their stories yet, I encourage you to get acquainted with each of them.

Previous rising stars have gone on to have successful careers in public office and some of them are even running for higher office, like Stacey Abrams who is running for governor of Georgia!

There is no doubt in my mind that each of this year's finalists has a promising career ahead of her in public service, too. But only one of these women can be the EMILY's List 2018 Rising Star Award recipient.

I can't wait to find out who this community selects.

**Don't wait -- vote for who you think this year's 2018 Rising Star recipient should be before 5:00 p.m. ET tomorrow:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Vote-2018-Rising-Star](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5082/24c69fd9/105200cb0/18967a61/789823366/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20180228_website_RisingStarVoting?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgVote2018RisingSt&utm_campaign=WQENEO15N_digital_email_20180306_RisingStarVoteClose_inact&source=WQENEO15N_digital_email_20180306_RisingStarVoteClose_inact")**

Thank you,

Gabrielle Giffords

subject: A coastal drilling disaster in the making.
body:
Time is running out to oppose the Trump administration’s offshore drilling scheme.

(https://act.nrdc.org/letter/national-monuments-mj-180209?source=DEMMONPET&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=logo&utm_campaign=email) (https://act.nrdc.org/letter/ocs-5-yr-zinke-180306?source=DEAOCSPET&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=logo&utm_campaign=email)

DONATE

Stop the Trump Administration’s Assault on Our Coastlines!

(https://act.nrdc.org/letter/ocs-5-yr-zinke-180306?source=DEAOCSPET&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=logo&utm_campaign=email)

Submit your official comment before the Friday deadline: Tell the Trump administration you vehemently oppose their plan to open virtually all our coastlines to toxic oil and gas drilling.

TAKE ACTION

Dear Activist:

This is urgent. There are just days left to voice your opposition to the Trump administration's disastrous plan to auction off America's coast for oil and gas drilling.

Interior Secretary Zinke's proposal opens the door for America's next big offshore oil spill, and many more after that, by expanding drilling into the Atlantic, Arctic, and Pacific Oceans and intensifying it in the Gulf of Mexico — effectively handing over almost all our oceans to Big Oil.

The Trump administration is ignoring public opinion, science, safety, and our planet's future — all to line the pockets of their fossil fuel industry allies.

We need your help to raise a national public outcry before the Friday deadline. Tell Interior Secretary Ryan Zinke you strongly oppose his offshore drilling scheme. (https://act.nrdc.org/letter/ocs-5-yr-zinke-180306?source=DEAOCSPET&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=logo&utm_campaign=email)

If President Trump and Secretary Zinke get their way, our coasts will be at grave risk. The future of many coastal communities — their economies and jobs — and the lives of marine animals hang in the balance.

Just eight years ago, the Deepwater Horizon oil rig exploded off the coast of Louisiana, spilling millions of gallons of crude oil into the Gulf of Mexico and triggering a catastrophe. Coastal communities were economically devastated... fishing operations screeched to a halt... and thousands of mammals, birds, and sea turtles perished.

We can't let something like this happen again. Before the public comment period ends on March 9, sign your name and urge Secretary Zinke to keep our coastlines off-limits to oil and gas drilling. (https://act.nrdc.org/letter/ocs-5-yr-zinke-180306?source=DEAOCSPET&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=logo&utm_campaign=email)

I'm sure you agree: We should be investing in clean, renewable energy, not risking our coastal waters and communities just to lock in new sources of carbon pollution fueling climate change.

NRDC is fighting back on all fronts. We're challenging the Trump administration's offshore drilling schemes in federal court, in Washington, and by mobilizing massive public opposition across the country.

Stand with us today by submitting an official comment telling Secretary Zinke to protect our irreplaceable coastal waters — not auction them off to the oil and gas industry. (https://act.nrdc.org/letter/ocs-5-yr-zinke-180306?source=DEAOCSPET&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=logo&utm_campaign=email)

Sincerely,

Rhea Suh
President, NRDC

The mission of the Natural Resources Defense Council (NRDC) is to safeguard the Earth: its people, its plants and animals, and the natural systems on which all life depends. We combine the power of three million members and online activists with the expertise of some 500 scientists, lawyers, and policy advocates across the globe to ensure the rights of all people to the air, the water, and the wild.
If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link:
http://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMjQ5LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMTk0NjAwMjM3

Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: The White House
subject: North Korea feels the pressure
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0b06d2ddbf01e0f28aa3b17ea84ac352f535ac32852665d1c5846a7095f3325adf9ff5d96455dd67d893ff66f232ddb057c80a05f0fb3b5e

North Korea feels the pressure

News broke yesterday that North Korean leader Kim Jong-un is willing to talk to the United States about giving up his country’s nuclear weapons, according to South Korean officials who traveled to Pyongyang this week.

President Donald J. Trump responded with cautious optimism that America’s “maximum pressure” campaign could produce a breakthrough. “For the first time in many years, a serious effort is being made by all parties concerned,” the President tweeted yesterday. “May be false hope, but the U.S. is ready to go hard in either direction!”

Vice President Mike Pence echoed Ronald Reagan in his statement about the Administration’s response. “Whichever direction talks with North Korea go, we will be firm in our resolve,” the Vice President said. “All options are on the table and our posture toward the regime will not change until we see credible, verifiable, and concrete steps toward denuclearization.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0b06d2ddbf01e0f203a0aa2f05c70e275e4633b5e1df05fd71d8d0320d8baf16c38858cf141510735974a47abba6fa796ca01c7a32c4031b
Read about Vice President Pence’s visit with North Korean defectors before the 2018 Olympic Games.

A year of achievements in science and technology

Since President Trump’s inauguration, the White House’s Office of Science and Technology Policy (OSTP) has built a robust team of more than 50 staff members, including a corps of scientists and engineers, policymakers, and academics. Today, OSTP unveils a report highlighting the tremendous science and technology achievements of the Administration to date.

The report is not an exhaustive list of activities, but it showcases select accomplishments that demonstrate how science and technology policymaking is helping to Make America Great Again.

A few of its highlights:

- President Trump’s 2018 Budget Request would result in the highest percentage of the budget allocated for Research & Development since fiscal year 2014.
- Last March, the President established the White House Office of American Innovation to develop policies to improve government services and drive technological breakthroughs.
- OSTP has been instrumental in Administration efforts to promote the free flow of data while standing firm against unfair trade practices.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0b06d2ddbf01e0f2a5939f4ff75c1566f89a62d44babbbdd4655401e687ea74113491a1deed3ee0a7fd7d538a8c984a34d8c33b882ac2bb3
Learn more about OSTP’s year of empowering Americans to innovate.

200 years with Sweden

“They’ve been with us for a long time. In fact, I think we’re together for about 200 years, to be exact,” President Trump told reporters before his bilateral meeting with Prime Minister Stefan Löfven of Sweden. “This is an anniversary.”

The President and Swedish Prime Minister discussed trade, security, and the threat from terrorism during their meeting yesterday at the White House. “Our relationship is a very strong one. We have trade deals; we have military deals,” President Trump said. “So we’re going to have quite a long discussion.”

President Trump also fielded questions about North Korea during the joint press conference. “Sweden will always be helpful. Sweden has been helpful in the past,” he said.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0b06d2ddbf01e0f20aefab745b1cd490e6666cc07b42bb1bbcb7becba2e06f0d4c498c603f3768c9ccc83bdea785d84275b0784988f0da45
Watch a short recap from President Trump’s visit with Prime Minister Löfven.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump and Prime Minister Stefan Löfven of Sweden | March 6, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Stephanie Chasez)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump will deliver remarks at the Latino Coalition Legislative Summit.

This afternoon, The Vice President will deliver keynote remarks at an America First Policies “Tax Cuts to Put America First” event.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0b06d2ddbf01e0f25a237cd68e43ca0f6fd4cd7f3e363bc42acbf040c3630ba8b6d828f09c2092183d976c8216ec36b2379bf38e60ca3cd2
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0b06d2ddbf01e0f212dcf1bd13900ac3f36260c6c6624c6dca76fb7b1b77694275764f8760c654f76c2ff90d4f0137d697da0b474e950cdc
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4ac531b9f3962510581b096d758b06bf2e3a11f8e5f69b0d03a7b6943d0aa8d81e987e426e51af2b9df152277bc89f6eed75bdeb6535fe92a
Unsubscribe

name: Jason Yates
subject: The results are in
body:
| | The first state primary is complete
---
[ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180307com01&n=1)
| Peter, Yesterday Texas’ first-in-the nation 2018 primary election took place. People all over the country kept a close eye on Texas for any indications on the forecast for the rest of the primary season nationwide. And certainly there were important indications of which we need to take notice. The primary brought in extremely high voter turnout numbers. For the first time since 2002 Democrat voter turnout surpassed 1 million voters on Tuesday. And over 1.5 million Republicans turned out to vote beating the previous Republican record of 1.48 million in the 2010 elections. Texas is a red state, so no one was surprised to see Republican voter turnout numbers, but what the nation is taking note of is the unusually high Democratic turnout in Texas. While Democrats aren’t likely to turn Texas blue, they are likely to set record voter turnout numbers across the nation in state primaries. We shared with you just a few weeks back about the Women’s March movement to see pro-choice voters bring “power to the polls” to elect pro-choice candidates. There is no doubt that a sharp ideological divide is taking shape in our nation. There are candidates who embrace a secular worldview and others who seek to advance a Judeo-Christian worldview. clean_body: | | The first state primary is complete | Peter, Yesterday Texas’ first-in-the nation 2018 primary election took place. People all over the country kept a close eye on Texas for any indications on the forecast for the rest of the primary season nationwide. And certainly there were important indications of which we need to take notice. The primary brought in extremely high voter turnout numbers. For the first time since 2002 Democrat voter turnout surpassed 1 million voters on Tuesday. And over 1.5 million Republicans turned out to vote beating the previous Republican record of 1.48 million in the 2010 elections. Texas is a red state, so no one was surprised to see Republican voter turnout numbers, but what the nation is taking note of is the unusually high Democratic turnout in Texas. While Democrats aren’t likely to turn Texas blue, they are likely to set record voter turnout numbers across the nation in state primaries. Hey --

One in five women rely on Planned Parenthood for reproductive care.[1]

But Republicans at every level of government are fighting to defund Planned Parenthood, and roll back a woman's right to choose.

We won't stand for it. That's why we're asking Pennsylvania supporters to sign our petition in support of Planned Parenthood.
**[Click here if you support Planned Parenthood ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecfc4/73a2bc12/3e12eba5/1fcccbe9/3174755598/VEsC/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/support-planned-parenthood?utm_campaign=em18_180307_ppfa_clk_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180307_ppfa_clk_clq_act__&utm_content=4+-+Click+here+if+you+support+Planned+Parent")**

As a former Planned Parenthood volunteer, Governor Wolf knows how vital the organization is to women's health care. From access to cancer screenings to reproductive care and contraception, they provide quality care to women and families at an affordable price.

Over 90,000 Pennsylvanians have been helped by Planned Parenthood.

_But Trump and his allies are more determined than ever on rolling back women 's rights -- no matter who it hurts._

Washington Republicans are fighting to defund organizations like Planned Parenthood, and Harrisburg Republicans -- our opponents included -- are supporting them.

Harrisburg Republicans even passed the most anti-women, anti-choice legislation in the country that would outlaw abortion after 20 weeks, even in cases of rape and incest.

That's why having a women's rights champion in office is so important. Governor Wolf vetoed Republicans' attempt to outlaw abortion, and he's always fighting to make sure that women have the right to choose.

**[We want to show that Planned Parenthood has thousands of supporters in Pennsylvania. So please, sign your name and support Planned Parenthood:](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecfc4/73a2bc12/3e12eba5/1fcccbef/3174755598/VEsA/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/support-planned-parenthood?utm_campaign=em18_180307_ppfa_clk_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180307_ppfa_clk_clq_act__&utm_content=6+-+We+want+to+show+that+Planned+Parenthood+")**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Support-Planned-Parenthood](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecfc4/73a2bc12/3e12eba5/1fcccbee/3174755598/VEsB/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/support-planned-parenthood?utm_campaign=em18_180307_ppfa_clk_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180307_ppfa_clk_clq_act__&utm_content=7+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomSupportPlannedPar")**

Thanks for your support,

_Wolf for PA_

name: Bob Poe, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Historic opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb316e/9e00690/42d81f93/2403a82a/2363584755/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180307_Poe_fnd_gq_nonOp__BP&source=em18_180307_Poe_fnd_gq_nonOp__BP")
Hello,

I wasn't planning on endorsing any of the candidates in this primary. I know them all personally and like them as people. But with what's going on, I needed to come off the sidelines.

We have a unique and historic opportunity to elect a bold candidate that strongly believes in our Democratic values, and isn't afraid to share them from the brightest blue cities to the deepest red counties of our state -- and everywhere in between.

**[That's why I'm proud to endorse Andrew Gillum for Governor.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb316e/9e00690/42d81f93/2403a82d/2363584755/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrew-gillum-bob-poe?utm_campaign=em18_180307_Poe_fnd_gq_nonOp__BP&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180307_Poe_fnd_gq_nonOp__BP&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+why+Irsquom+proud+to+endorse+")**[ ](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb316e/9e00690/42d81f93/2403a82c/2363584755/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrew-gillum-bob-poe?utm_campaign=em18_180306_Poe_fnd_gq_act__BP&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180306_Poe_fnd_gq_act__BP&utm_content=3+-++")

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb316e/9e00690/42d81f93/2403a82f/2363584755/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrew-gillum-bob-poe?utm_campaign=em18_180307_Poe_fnd_gq_nonOp__BP&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180307_Poe_fnd_gq_nonOp__BP&utm_content=4")

I've been on the front lines with you as a volunteer and activist. Behind the scenes, I've been a fundraiser and donor to many Democratic candidates and causes. I even had the honor to serve as your state party Chair. And as a candidate for Congress, I proposed a ban on assault weapons after the tragedy at Pulse.

And, in all those years I've never seen a candidate quite like Andrew.

As a student leader at Florida A&M, he took it to Jeb Bush and the Republicans when they removed the state's Affirmative Action guidelines.

As the Mayor of Tallahassee, he took the NRA to court and won.

In the last several weeks, he's taken it to the streets arm-in-arm with the students at Marjory Stoneman Douglas, both in Tallahassee and in Broward.

Andrew is the candidate we've been waiting for.

I always say, "if you want to make a difference, you've got to be the difference."

It was time for me, and now it's time for you, to be the difference for Andrew.

**[Watch my endorsement video and then chip in to help elect Andrew in November.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb316e/9e00690/42d81f93/2403a82e/2363584755/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrew-gillum-bob-poe?utm_campaign=em18_180307_Poe_fnd_gq_nonOp__BP&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180307_Poe_fnd_gq_nonOp__BP&utm_content=5+-+Watch+my+endorsement+video+and+then+chip")**

Thank you,

Bob Poe
Former Chair of the Florida Democratic Party

subject: BREAKING: A great night in Texas
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c516a/24c69fd9/1045a5d9a/189672df/2585852319/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEO16N_digital_email_20180307_TXPrimaryReportback_inact&source=WQEFEO16N_digital_email_20180307_TXPrimaryReportback_inact")
---

Peter,

Our women had a historic night in Texas last night!

Veronica Escobar and Sylvia Garcia won their primary elections outright. Texas has never sent a Latina to Congress, and they could both be the _first_.

Our other candidates -- Gina Ortiz Jones, Lizzie Pannill Fletcher, and Lillian Salerno -- are advancing to run-off elections on May 22nd. Their races are top opportunities to turn red House seats blue, and we know our women are the right candidates to defeat Republicans.

All five of these women were running in crowded primaries, so these results are a testament to the strong support of this community.

But we can't rest on our laurels. Gina, Lizzie, and Lillian need your help to win their runoffs. And we still have dozens of other women in competitive primaries across the country.

Let's show them we've still got their backs.

body:
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/bDyg3oxuX0WqKUnINSiION-7DEOLlYFuukS7lp08ASk=/JeZ0mhW3Zj4orgCInGDe3C1cYTewqDi7eikjmb1SA2I=?am=10&recipientId=GYKgujd1qXAheZskgLys31&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)
---
Dear friend, After only eight short days to collect the necessary 1,000 valid petition signatures,**I have officially secured my spot on the ballot to become Pennsylvania 's next Lieutenant Governor!** My campaign delivered 4,289 signatures to Harrisburg yesterday, and we couldn't have done it without the help of our dedicated volunteers! In case you missed it, Pennsylvania redistricting pushed our campaign into newly drawn Congressional districts late last month. After careful consideration and an outpouring of support, I chose to take my platform -- of making progressive change, working for evidence-based policy, and being an outspoken advocate for women and immigrants -- statewide! Now that we're securely on the ballot, we have to hit the ground running to raise the kind of funds necessary to reach voters in every corner of the state. **[So I'm asking: can you chip in $10 to make sure we start out this new race with fresh momentum?](https://act.myngp.com/el/bDyg3oxuX0WqKUnINSiION-7DEOLlYFuukS7lp08ASk=/JeZ0mhW3Zj4orgCInGDe3C1cYTewqDi7eikjmb1SA2I=?am=10&recipientId=GYKgujd1qXAheZskgLys31&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)** [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/bDyg3oxuX0WqKUnINSiION-7DEOLlYFuukS7lp08ASk=/JeZ0mhW3Zj4orgCInGDe3C1cYTewqDi7eikjmb1SA2I=?am=10&recipientId=GYKgujd1qXAheZskgLys31&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) By giving, you'll be helping our campaign right away -- your donation makes it possible for me and my team travel the state to recruit new supporters and volunteers to amplify our message to every Pennsylvania voter. From Philadelphia to Erie, back to Scranton and then to Pittsburgh, we'll be crisscrossing the state until May 15th's Primary Election. **[Can you chip in $10 today to help us reach every Pennsylvania Democrat before May 15th?](https://act.myngp.com/el/bDyg3oxuX0WqKUnINSiION-7DEOLlYFuukS7lp08ASk=/JeZ0mhW3Zj4orgCInGDe3C1cYTewqDi7eikjmb1SA2I=?am=10&recipientId=GYKgujd1qXAheZskgLys31&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)** **The other big thing that 's changed for our campaign's fundraising is the contribution limits -- in a statewide race, there is no cap for any individual giving to our campaign.** As your next Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania, I know I'll be able to continue to make positive change, and bring a new voice and fresh perspective to the State House. **[I stand to be the first woman of color to hold this office in Pennsylvania. Let 's work together to break down barriers and make history.](https://act.myngp.com/el/bDyg3oxuX0WqKUnINSiION-7DEOLlYFuukS7lp08ASk=/JeZ0mhW3Zj4orgCInGDe3C1cYTewqDi7eikjmb1SA2I=?am=10&recipientId=GYKgujd1qXAheZskgLys31&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)** Thank you for being a part of this, Nina [CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.myngp.com/el/bDyg3oxuX0WqKUnINSiION-7DEOLlYFuukS7lp08ASk=/JeZ0mhW3Zj4orgCInGDe3C1cYTewqDi7eikjmb1SA2I=?am=10&recipientId=GYKgujd1qXAheZskgLys31&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) **_About Dr. Nina Ahmad:_** Nina Ahmad is a first-generation Bangladeshi American, scientist, and former President of the Philadelphia chapter of the National Organization for Women. She is running to bring integrity and accountability to the state house and to be an outspoken progressive voice in Pennsylvania politics.
**[Learn more about Nina>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/bDyg3oxuX0WqKUnINSiION-7DEOLlYFuukS7lp08ASk=/wywHJAQV_HbOSM76EUvbl0nuzQoQjl8oiclEf_zmBok=)** _**Stay in Touch:**_ **[website](https://act.myngp.com/el/bDyg3oxuX0WqKUnINSiION-7DEOLlYFuukS7lp08ASk=/FVWC83tGgmaERaBu12ettxuRxMKLQQFtvRsj2ZxBX-E=) | [facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/bDyg3oxuX0WqKUnINSiION-7DEOLlYFuukS7lp08ASk=/FrQPmwVBzWtL5-QcbEx-THW0W0ghNvdMaTlDlmFVeqA=) | [twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/bDyg3oxuX0WqKUnINSiION-7DEOLlYFuukS7lp08ASk=/e99tNoLFl0RAGJ2qa3FQ-RnPELI1FDdECowGP2XAmDg=)**

name: Ben Jealous
subject: The virus of hatred
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friends,
Here's the hard truth: it wasn't too long ago that the housing market was able to discriminate against homebuyers simply because of the color of their skin. That is why the Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) took a stand and added anti-discrimination language in their mission statement, promising "strong, sustainable, inclusive communities and quality affordable homes for all," that would be, "free from discrimination."
Yet new reports show HUD Secretary Ben Carson wants to forget about the history of blatant discrimination against minorities. He announced that HUD is removing anti-discrimination language from its mission statement in a partisan attempt to bend to the Trump administration's racist and homophobic agenda.
**[Since he was elected, Donald Trump and the GOP have promoted thinly veiled discrimination as common-sense legislation. By removing anti-discrimination language from HUD's mission statement, this administration is sending a dog-whistle message that they don't take discrimination seriously. But, oppression is oppression. Hatred is hatred. Discrimination in any form cannot be tolerated. Add your name if you agree.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a743/7ab0e2c4/7f5ffea6/349a085b/3159084682/VEsH/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/stand-up-against-discrimination?source=OHQ03078A")**
HUD is not the first agency that has changed its mission statement since Trump took office. Last month, the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services, removed the phrase "nation of immigrants" from its mission statement.
Under President Barack Obama, our nation made huge strides in civil rights. Obama's work -- partnered with the work of the civil and human rights movement -- was able to empower America to be a more perfect example of unity. Whether an individual is being discriminated against because of their sexual orientation, gender identity, race, religion, or creed, we must stand together and say "**no** ".
We cannot let decades of hard work for civil and human rights be dismantled by Trump's dangerous white supremacist agenda -- because removing a few words from HUD's mission statement might seem innocent, but it sets a dangerous precedent. We must stand strong and fight back.
**[The only thing more damaging than this administration's failure to recognize our common struggles is our own failure to come together on issues of common interest. We mustn't let them divide us. If you believe that we must stand up against discrimination, add your name here.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a743/7ab0e2c4/7f5ffea6/349a085b/3159084682/VEsE/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/stand-up-against-discrimination?source=OHQ03078A")**
The virus of hatred anywhere requires ending it everywhere. The more we honor and embrace the diversity in all our communities the more we will all succeed.
Onward,
Ben Jealous
****[CHIP IN](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a743/7ab0e2c4/7f5ffea6/349a085a/3159084682/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st3-18?refcode=OHQ03078A")****

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a743/7ab0e2c4/7f5ffea6/349a0845/3159084682/VEsC/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a743/7ab0e2c4/7f5ffea6/349a0844/3159084682/VEsD/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. [Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a743/7ab0e2c4/7f5ffea6/349a0846/3159084682/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). After exploding the deficit with their tax bill last year, some GOP leaders now want to pay for it by cutting Medicare and Social Security.

**[Kyrsten needs to hear what you think of these proposals. Click here to take part in our Medicare and Social Security focus group>>](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d0e38/45aebd3c/477d6f89/2caed77a/282807928/VEsE/ "http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/content/focusgroup-mar18/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2+-+Kyrsten+needs+to+hear+what+you+think+of+&utm_campaign=KS_EM_EN_WL_180307_1_1&source=KS_EM_EN_WL_180307_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_EN_WL_180307_1_1#framework")**

She understands these are earned benefits that hardworking Americans count on in retirement, and she's committed to strengthening them for current seniors and future generations. But she needs to know if you're with her on this.

**[Take our focus group survey right away to share your thoughts with Kyrsten.](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d0e38/45aebd3c/477d6f89/2caed77b/282807928/VEsF/ "http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/content/focusgroup-mar18/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=3+-+Take+our+focus+group+survey+right+away+t&utm_campaign=KS_EM_EN_WL_180307_1_1&source=KS_EM_EN_WL_180307_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_EN_WL_180307_1_1#framework")**

Team Sinema
